## Summary
Describe the main change in 2-5 bullets.

## Why this change
Explain the motivation.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles locally with `make check`
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Outputs regenerated if model logic changed
- [ ] New data sources documented if applicable
- [ ] Screenshots attached for visible dashboard changes

## Validation
Describe how you tested the change.

## Notes for reviewers
Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
